name: National Health Insurance Research Database (NHIRD)
notes: Population-based outpatient, inpatient, and pharmacy claims.

name: National Health Insurance Service-National Health Insurance Database (NHIS-NHID)
notes: Population-based outpatient, inpatient, and pharmacy claims.

name: Clinical Data Analysis and Reporting System (CDARS)
notes: Hospital Authority territory-wide electronic medical records covering public-sector clinical care.

name: Japan Medical Data Center (JMDC)
notes: Employer-based claims linked with annual health-check data.

name: National Database of Health Insurance Claims (NDB)
notes: Nationwide insurance claims; access restricted to government and academic applicants.

name: Japan Medical Data Center (JMDC)
notes: Working-age population claims with health-check data.

name: National Health Insurance Service – National Health Information Database (NHIS-NHID)
notes: Population-level claims with periodic national health screening linkage.

name: National Electronic Health Record (NEHR)
notes: Singapore's national electronic health record system.

name: National Health Insurance Research Database (NHIRD)
notes: Universal single-payer claims; 70+ billion records and 3.4 billion medical images as of 2024, now including structured laboratory and imaging data.

name: Chang Gung Research Database (CGRD)
coverage: ~1.3M outpatients + ~200K inpatients per year (~6–10% of national population)
notes: Standardized electronic medical records from seven Chang Gung Memorial Hospitals; available since 2000 with ~1-month data latency.

name: Taiwan Stroke Registry (TSR)
notes: Prospective registry of acute stroke cases.

name: Buddhachinaraj Hospital Database (BH)
notes: Tertiary referral hospital electronic medical records.

name: Hospital Information (HI) — Ubon Ratchathani
notes: Networked electronic medical records from 21 community hospitals.
